_meta.name: English
_meta.notes: Source language. lm_keys are LocalizedKey raw values used via L(.key) / LanguageManager. All other language files fall back to these strings when a translation is missing.

tagline.en: Grow with joy, learn with love
tagline.translation: Grow with joy, learn with love

launch_tagline.en: Grow with joy, learn with love
launch_tagline.translation: Grow with joy, learn with love

tap_to_add_name_photo.en: Tap to add your name and photo
tap_to_add_name_photo.translation: Tap to add your name and photo

address_not_found.en: Address not found. Try a more specific address.
address_not_found.translation: Address not found. Try a more specific address.

address_resolved.en: Address will be resolved when you start navigation
address_resolved.translation: Address will be resolved when you start navigation

quick_access_hint.en: Tap to select your favourite features
quick_access_hint.translation: Tap to select your favourite features

tapStarChart.en: Tap to see your star chart
tapStarChart.translation: Tap to see your star chart

tapEmotion.en: Tap an emotion to learn about it
tapEmotion.translation: Tap an emotion to learn about it

tap_face_to_learn.en: Tap a face to learn about that feeling
tap_face_to_learn.translation: Tap a face to learn about that feeling

speak_and_get_response.en: Speak and get a friendly response
speak_and_get_response.translation: Speak and get a friendly response

camera_permission.en: Please allow camera access in Settings.
camera_permission.translation: Please allow camera access in Settings.

tapToHearWord.en: Tap any card to hear the word spoken
tapToHearWord.translation: Tap any card to hear the word spoken

safe_at_home.en: Safe to try at home with a grown-up
safe_at_home.translation: Safe to try at home with a grown-up

tap_scenario.en: Tap a scenario to learn about paying and getting change
tap_scenario.translation: Tap a scenario to learn about paying and getting change

add_task_to_build.en: Tap \\"Add Task\\" to build your daily routine
add_task_to_build.translation: Tap \\"Add Task\\" to build your daily routine

celebration_message.en: You finished all your tasks.\\nAmazing work today!
celebration_message.translation: You finished all your tasks.\\nAmazing work today!

no_activities_scheduled.en: No activities scheduled. Tap + to add.
no_activities_scheduled.translation: No activities scheduled. Tap + to add.

memories_subtitle.en: Photos and videos of my favourite moments
memories_subtitle.translation: Photos and videos of my favourite moments

tap_to_add_memory.en: Tap \\"+\\" to add your first memory
tap_to_add_memory.translation: Tap \\"+\\" to add your first memory

video_stories_subtitle.en: Video stories that teach life skills
video_stories_subtitle.translation: Video stories that teach life skills

video_modeling_subtitle.en: Watch a task to learn how to do it
video_modeling_subtitle.translation: Watch a task to learn how to do it

virtual_tours_subtitle.en: Explore the world from your screen
virtual_tours_subtitle.translation: Explore the world from your screen

explore_from_screen.en: Explore the world from your screen
explore_from_screen.translation: Explore the world from your screen

tap_to_learn.en: Tap any place to learn about it
tap_to_learn.translation: Tap any place to learn about it

six_second_explain.en: After asking a question or giving an instruction, wait silently for 6 seconds before repeating.
six_second_explain.translation: After asking a question or giving an instruction, wait silently for 6 seconds before repeating.

mic_permission.en: Please allow microphone and speech recognition access in Settings.
mic_permission.translation: Please allow microphone and speech recognition access in Settings.

talk_about_feelings.en: Tap the mic and talk about how you feel!
talk_about_feelings.translation: Tap the mic and talk about how you feel!

app_lock_desc.en: When locked, the child cannot switch to other apps.
app_lock_desc.translation: When locked, the child cannot switch to other apps.

ask_parent_to_unlock.en: Ask a parent or carer to unlock
ask_parent_to_unlock.translation: Ask a parent or carer to unlock

download_neural_voice.en: Download Apple's free neural voice for a much more natural sound.
download_neural_voice.translation: Download Apple's free neural voice for a much more natural sound.

tables_subtitle.en: Learn 1 to 20 times tables with fun!
tables_subtitle.translation: Learn 1 to 20 times tables with fun!

tap_to_navigate.en: Tap a place to get directions
tap_to_navigate.translation: Tap a place to get directions

add_behavior_entries.en: Add behavior entries to see patterns here.
add_behavior_entries.translation: Add behavior entries to see patterns here.

no_resolutions_yet.en: No resolutions logged yet — add some in your entries!
no_resolutions_yet.translation: No resolutions logged yet — add some in your entries!

history_over_time.en: Your logged entries will appear here over time.
history_over_time.translation: Your logged entries will appear here over time.

tap_to_log_moment.en: Tap + to log a difficult moment, or use Quick Log above
tap_to_log_moment.translation: Tap + to log a difficult moment, or use Quick Log above

darker_more.en: Darker = more entries in that time window
darker_more.translation: Darker = more entries in that time window

emergency_card_info.en: Fill in your child's details below. In an emergency, tap Share to show this card to anyone who needs to help.
emergency_card_info.translation: Fill in your child's details below. In an emergency, tap Share to show this card to anyone who needs to help.

add_emergency_contacts.en: Add emergency contacts by editing the card
add_emergency_contacts.translation: Add emergency contacts by editing the card

calming_section.en: What helps calm them down — comma separated
calming_section.translation: What helps calm them down — comma separated

do_not_placeholder.en: e.g. raise voice, touch without warning
do_not_placeholder.translation: e.g. raise voice, touch without warning

sensory_profile_info.en: This profile helps anyone caring for your child understand their sensory needs at a glance.
sensory_profile_info.translation: This profile helps anyone caring for your child understand their sensory needs at a glance.

my_stories_hint.en: Create personal social stories with your child's name and places
my_stories_hint.translation: Create personal social stories with your child's name and places

create_first_story.en: Tap + to create your first personalised story
create_first_story.translation: Tap + to create your first personalised story

no_pages_yet.en: No pages yet. Tap + to add pages.
no_pages_yet.translation: No pages yet. Tap + to add pages.

locked_explain.en: When locked, the child cannot switch to other apps or access the home screen without entering your PIN.
locked_explain.translation: When locked, the child cannot switch to other apps or access the home screen without entering your PIN.

need_pin_first.en: You must set a 4-digit unlock PIN before App Lock can be enabled. Choose a PIN your child does not know.
need_pin_first.translation: You must set a 4-digit unlock PIN before App Lock can be enabled. Choose a PIN your child does not know.

pin_advice.en: Choose a PIN your child can't guess. Avoid 1234, 0000, or any 4 of the same digit.
pin_advice.translation: Choose a PIN your child can't guess. Avoid 1234, 0000, or any 4 of the same digit.

pin_mismatch.en: PINs don't match or aren't 4 digits
pin_mismatch.translation: PINs don't match or aren't 4 digits

pin_too_easy.en: PIN too easy to guess — choose another
pin_too_easy.translation: PIN too easy to guess — choose another

pick_start_and_end.en: Pick a start and end place!
pick_start_and_end.translation: Pick a start and end place!

tap_plus_to_add.en: Tap + to add home, school, or your favourite park.
tap_plus_to_add.translation: Tap + to add home, school, or your favourite park.

current_location_warning.en: ⚠️ Your current location will be saved for this place.
current_location_warning.translation: ⚠️ Your current location will be saved for this place.

first_then_subtitle.en: Do this first, then you get that!
first_then_subtitle.translation: Do this first, then you get that!

feelings_check_in_sub.en: How am I feeling right now?
feelings_check_in_sub.translation: How am I feeling right now?

my_worries_box_sub.en: Write a worry and let it go
my_worries_box_sub.translation: Write a worry and let it go

choice_board_sub.en: Tap what you want to do
choice_board_sub.translation: Tap what you want to do

tap_how_you_feel.en: Tap how you feel right now:
tap_how_you_feel.translation: Tap how you feel right now:

tap_add_task_hint.en: Tap "Add Task" to build your daily routine
tap_add_task_hint.translation: Tap "Add Task" to build your daily routine

all_tasks_done.en: You finished all your tasks.\nAmazing work today!
all_tasks_done.translation: You finished all your tasks.\nAmazing work today!

no_stars_yet_earn.en: No stars yet today — earn your first one!
no_stars_yet_earn.translation: No stars yet today — earn your first one!

tap_add_memory_hint.en: Tap "Add a Memory" to save a photo or video of something special.
tap_add_memory_hint.translation: Tap "Add a Memory" to save a photo or video of something special.

times_table_subtitle.en: Learn & quiz yourself on all 20 tables!
times_table_subtitle.translation: Learn & quiz yourself on all 20 tables!

fetching_content.en: Fetching the latest content from the server.
fetching_content.translation: Fetching the latest content from the server.

pull_to_refresh.en: Pull down to refresh, or check your internet connection.
pull_to_refresh.translation: Pull down to refresh, or check your internet connection.

video_unavailable_desc.en: This video cannot be played in-app. Tap below to watch it on YouTube.
video_unavailable_desc.translation: This video cannot be played in-app. Tap below to watch it on YouTube.

face_data_privacy.en: Face data stays on your device — never sent to the cloud
face_data_privacy.translation: Face data stays on your device — never sent to the cloud

tap_add_person_hint.en: Tap "Add Person" to save a photo and name for people you know.
tap_add_person_hint.translation: Tap "Add Person" to save a photo and name for people you know.

take_or_upload.en: Take or upload a photo\nto identify who this is
take_or_upload.translation: Take or upload a photo\nto identify who this is

no_face_found.en: No face found. Try again with a clearer photo.
no_face_found.translation: No face found. Try again with a clearer photo.

mic_permission_needed.en: Please allow microphone and speech recognition access in Settings to use Voice Chat.
mic_permission_needed.translation: Please allow microphone and speech recognition access in Settings to use Voice Chat.

pick_outline_hint.en: Pick an outline to colour in, or start with a blank canvas.
pick_outline_hint.translation: Pick an outline to colour in, or start with a blank canvas.

personalise_hint.en: Personalise the app so your child gets the right videos — in their language, matched to their interests.
personalise_hint.translation: Personalise the app so your child gets the right videos — in their language, matched to their interests.

prefs_saved.en: Your preferences are saved. SproutPath will now show videos and activities tailored just for you.
prefs_saved.translation: Your preferences are saved. SproutPath will now show videos and activities tailored just for you.

camera_permission_desc.en: Please allow camera access in Settings so the app can see your face expressions.
camera_permission_desc.translation: Please allow camera access in Settings so the app can see your face expressions.

simulator_note.en: Mirror Mode uses the front camera. Run on a real device to use face detection.
simulator_note.translation: Mirror Mode uses the front camera. Run on a real device to use face detection.

these_are_notes.en: These are the %@ notes and coins
these_are_notes.translation: These are the %@ notes and coins

about_description.en: SproutPath is a gentle, child-friendly learning companion designed to support neurodivergent children and their families. It combines emotions, study, daily routines, calming tools, and parent resources into one calm space — built around the way real children learn and play.
about_description.translation: SproutPath is a gentle, child-friendly learning companion designed to support neurodivergent children and their families. It combines emotions, study, daily routines, calming tools, and parent resources into one calm space — built around the way real children learn and play.

made_with_care.en: Made with care for children, parents, caregivers, and therapists. Thank you for using SproutPath.
made_with_care.translation: Made with care for children, parents, caregivers, and therapists. Thank you for using SproutPath.

faq_intro.en: Frequently asked questions about using SproutPath. Tap a question to read the answer.
faq_intro.translation: Frequently asked questions about using SproutPath. Tap a question to read the answer.

no_autism_videos_hint.en: Add autism-category videos to your videos.json or remote JSON feed.
no_autism_videos_hint.translation: Add autism-category videos to your videos.json or remote JSON feed.

tap_symbols_hint.en: Tap symbols to build a sentence...
tap_symbols_hint.translation: Tap symbols to build a sentence...

notice_things.en: Look around you and notice %d things.
notice_things.translation: Look around you and notice %d things.

six_second_rule_explain.en: After asking a question or giving an instruction, wait silently for 6 seconds before repeating. This gives the brain the processing time it needs. Repeating too soon causes anxiety and resets the processing clock.
six_second_rule_explain.translation: After asking a question or giving an instruction, wait silently for 6 seconds before repeating. This gives the brain the processing time it needs. Repeating too soon causes anxiety and resets the processing clock.

six_second_type_hint.en: Type the question first, then tap Start Timer.
six_second_type_hint.translation: Type the question first, then tap Start Timer.

confirm_remove_photo.en: The family photo will be removed from the dashboard.
confirm_remove_photo.translation: The family photo will be removed from the dashboard.

guided_access_instructions.en: For the strongest protection (blocks home button, volume buttons, and touch regions), enable Guided Access in Settings → Accessibility → Guided Access, then triple-click the side button while SproutPath is open.
guided_access_instructions.translation: For the strongest protection (blocks home button, volume buttons, and touch regions), enable Guided Access in Settings → Accessibility → Guided Access, then triple-click the side button while SproutPath is open.

add_edit_symbol_hint.en: Enter a YouTube link or video ID above to preview
add_edit_symbol_hint.translation: Enter a YouTube link or video ID above to preview

open_settings_to_enable.en: Open Settings to enable notifications for SproutPath
open_settings_to_enable.translation: Open Settings to enable notifications for SproutPath

flashcards_subtitle.en: Tap a deck to start practising.
flashcards_subtitle.translation: Tap a deck to start practising.
